title: Robin Boards the Sea Train
description: The Franky Family and Galley-La shipwrights join the Straw Hats, turning Robin’s rescue into a shared mission.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Iceburg, Luffy, Nico Nico Robin, Nami, Zoro. The Franky Family and Galley-La shipwrights join the Straw Hats, turning Robin’s rescue into a shared mission.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It was because of that Reindeer.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Ah!!...Hey, iceburg- San!! Don't move yet....!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Nico Robin
dialogue.text: I accused you of a horrible crime.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'll take care of it somehow, later...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Nico Robin
dialogue.text: When you came to this town?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Nico Robin
dialogue.text: She disappeared when we got here...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Nico Robin
dialogue.text: We don't know what's going on.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: To make my wish come true...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: A wish that won't be granted...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'll tell you what I know...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: That the govern- Ment's Plan started...

summary: The Franky Family and Galley-La shipwrights join the Straw Hats, turning Robin’s rescue into a shared mission.
